overview.value: ZZ Plant has glossy upright leaves and thick rhizomes that store water. It is a reliable choice for lower-light spaces and irregular watering routines.

localizedContentsJSON.value: {"en":{"commonName":"ZZ Plant","overview":"ZZ Plant has glossy upright leaves and thick rhizomes that store water. It is a reliable choice for lower-light spaces and irregular watering routines.","tips":"Rotate the pot occasionally so stems grow evenly toward the light."},"zh-Hans":{"commonName":"金钱树","overview":"金钱树有油亮直立的叶片和能储水的肥厚根茎。它适合光线偏弱的空间，也能容忍不规律浇水。","tips":"偶尔转动花盆，让枝叶均匀朝光生长。"}}
